description: The Petullà are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cinquefrondi, Italy. Active since the 1980s in international drug trafficking, they have members in northern Italy, France, Germany, Peru, and Australia. The clan has been involved in feuds with rival 'ndrine such as the Foriglio and has been targeted in multiple police operations.

country_links.context: The organization has members in Australia.
